channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A Curling Scandal Rocks Olympic Ice
item.description: Allegations of cheating, and swearing, on the curling ice have rocked the wholesome sport after the Swedes accused the Canadians of "double touching" ...

item.title: Actor Robert Duvall has died — he brought a compassionate center to edgy hard roles
item.description: Duvall appeared in over 90 films over the course of his career, imbuing stock Hollywood types — cowboys, cops, soldiers — with a nuanced sense of vuln...

item.title: The U.S. ready to make up, Europe ready to break up in Munich
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio tried to reassure Europe at the Munich Security Conference, but European leaders are skeptical.

item.title: Primary care is in trouble. Doctors are banding together to increase market power
item.description: As costs increase, primary care practices are joining forces in Independent Physician Associations. The goal is to leverage better insurance contracts...

item.title: Italy's athletes shine at the Milan Cortina Olympics
item.description: Call it homefield advantage, call it national pride. Italy's athletes are shining in the Winter Olympics underway in Milan and the Alps.

item.title: Fractal Analytics’ muted IPO debut signals persistent AI fears in India
item.description: As India's first AI company to IPO, Fractal Analytics didn't have a stellar first day on the public markets, as enthusiasm for the technology collided...

item.title: Nancy Guthrie kidnapping investigators work with Walmart after identifying suspect’s backpack
item.description: Investigators working on the disappearance of “Today” show host Savannah Guthrie’s mother are consulting with Walmart management to develop leads.

item.title: Opening statements held in the trial of a Georgia high school shooting suspect’s father
Flapping Airplanes on the future of AI: ‘We want to try really radically different things’
item.description: "We're exploring a different set of tradeoffs."

item.title: Have money, will travel: a16z’s hunt for the next European unicorn
item.description: According to a16z, it has eyes around the world in order to spot companies as early as local funds might.

item.title: Stop Buying Rentals and Start Buying Rental Portfolios (Scale Much Faster)
item.description: If you want financial freedom faster, you need to stop buying rentals and start buying rental portfolios. Most people have never thought about it. Ins...

item.title: After all the hype, some AI experts don’t think OpenClaw is all that exciting
item.description: "From an AI research perspective, this is nothing novel," one expert told TechCrunch.

item.title: Buying 4 Small Multifamily Rentals in Just 2 Years (While Working a W2)
item.description: The what-ifs of real estate investing keep many rookies on the sidelines indefinitely. But when today’s guest determined his “safe” nine-to-five was j...

item.title: NAACP asks judge to protect against ‘misuse’ of voter data seized by FBI in Georgia’s Fulton County
How Ricursive Intelligence raised $335M at a $4B valuation in 4 months
item.description: The reason why this nascent startup had VCs lining up is the founders.They are so famed in the AI world, everyone tried to hire them.

item.title: How to Buy Rental #2, #3, or #4 When You’re Out of Funds (Rookie Reply)
item.description: Stuck at one rental property? Maybe you spent years saving for that first down payment, and now, your funds are depleted. Where do you go from here? N...

item.title: How to (Legally) Pay the Least Amount in Taxes as a Real Estate Investor
item.description: This episode alone could save you hundreds, thousands, or tens of thousands in taxes—all with 100% legal means. If you own a rental property, you coul...

item.title: Grand Rapids Could Become a Boomtown as Investment Money Pours In
item.description: Looking for an affordable, cash-flowing market earmarked for major development and a projected population and economic surge? Grand Rapids, Michigan, ...
